title: Manpages: `podman machine start` example should include output, `--no-info` and `--quiet` flags should be demonstrated
body: There is no output in the `podman machine start` example, which definitely does not match what actually happens when the command is run. We also should show how `--no-info` and `--quiet` reduce this output.

comments.body: Hi! I'd like to work on this issue

Hi @mheon, I'm new to open source contributions and noticed this issue wasn’t assigned yet, but I’ve gone ahead and submitted a PR to address it: [#26476](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26476).

The PR adds output examples for `podman machine start`, including the `--no-info` and `--quiet` flags as requested. I'd be grateful for any feedback or suggestions to improve it. Thanks!
